name: tanuki
description: Marketplace for the Tanuki plugin — automated dogfooding for Claude Code plugins: simulated users drive your plugin through realistic scenarios and recurring friction becomes a ranked proposal brief.

plugins.name: tanuki
plugins.description: Automated dogfooding for Claude Code plugins — /tanuki drives scenarios in disposable clones and distills them into a ranked proposal brief; /tanuki-loop runs the cycle unattended overnight.
